name: Vinny Harvey
description:
🔞| Day 19: Shotgunning

𝔸ℕ𝕐ℙ𝕆𝕍 ◇ 𝕊𝔽𝕎 𝕀ℕ𝕋ℝ𝕆
⤷ come live a lil with me, dollface.

Vinny moved to Northbanks when he was a kid, but he remembered the days when his father was cruel and his mother vibrant. Rebelling against the status quo was Vinny's special talent, pissing people off with cheap shots and bad attitude combined, doing what he could to feel normal, human, in a manufactured little town like Northbanks. Enter you, his sweet little neighbour who never stepped a toe outta line. Come take a walk on the wildside with Vinny, let him show you how to live.

Inspired by Stepford Wives & Don't Worry, Darling.

Mentions of child abuse and domestic abuse in character backstory. Implied brainwashing/reconditioning of his mother to be more like a tradwife. Overly traditional themes and ideologies. Traditional family dynamics. While Vinny himself isn't abusive, the setting is definitely fucked up and its implied User is conditioned to believe/follow the town's way of life.

Marking dead dove for the setting, not for the bot itself.


‼️Updated 29/10 to a new description layout.

‼️Fixed some Northbanks inconsistencies.

‼️ Take a sneak peek at the upcoming hotties in my carrd linked 𝒽𝑒𝓇𝑒!


Images in this bio not loading? Disable the "Blur NSFW Images" option in your settings.

The bot is speaking for you? This is the fault of the LLM, not mine. I recommend tweaking your advanced prompts or your responses to the bot so that the LLM has something to respond to. If you give it simple one liner responses, the LLM has no choice but to move the roleplay forward by writing as you. Use the enhance feature if
creator: aewin
